title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at AFL Logistics

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at AFL Logistics
jsonLd.description:
Join the AFL Logistics family as a Fleet Manager in Howrah. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About AFL Logistics:
AFL Logistics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AFL Logistics!
